title: Cookie Clicker
description: The original idle game where you bake cookies to rule the universe. Click the big cookie, buy upgrades, and recruit grandmas to help you bake more cookies!

title: Run 3
description: Run, jump, and defy gravity in this classic space runner. Navigate through ever-changing tunnels and avoid falling into the void.

title: Retro Bowl
description: The perfect game for the armchair quarterback. Take control of your favorite football team and lead them to glory in this retro-styled sports sim.
Join the numbers and get to the 2048 tile! A simple but addictive puzzle game where you slide tiles on a grid to combine them and reach the highest score.

title: Slope
description: A fast-paced 3D runner game where you control a ball rolling down a steep slope. Avoid obstacles and stay on the track as you accelerate to breakneck speeds.

title: Flappy Bird
description: Tap to fly and dodge the green pipes in this classic, notoriously difficult arcade game. How far can you get?

title: Drive Mad
description: A challenging monster truck driving game where you navigate through various obstacles and terrains. Balance your speed and control to reach the finish line without flipping over!

title: Slither
description: Grow your snake by consuming glowing orbs and outsmart other players in this addictive multiplayer arena game. Become the biggest snake on the leaderboard!

title: Ultrakill
description: A fast-paced, ultra-violent retro FPS. Maneuver through hellish environments, use blood to heal, and unleash stylish combos on your enemies in this intense shooter.

title: Tiny Fishing
description: Cast your line, catch as many fish as you can, and upgrade your gear to reach deeper waters. A relaxing and addictive fishing game!

title: Wall-E
description: In a distant future, a small waste-collecting robot inadvertently embarks on a space journey that will ultimately decide the fate of mankind.

title: Interstellar
description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

title: A Minecraft Movie
description: Based on the global phenomenon, A Minecraft Movie is the first-ever big-screen, live-action adaptation of the best-selling video game of all time.

title: John Wick: Chapter 1
description: An ex-hit-man comes out of retirement to track down the gangsters that killed his dog and took everything from him.
